src/main/java/nl/optifit/backendservice/.general_idea: Enable Spring's task scheduling infrastructure to support periodic background tasks.
Disable the default CosmosDB Vector Store auto-configuration to allow for custom bean definitions or configuration.
Add Lombok's Slf4j logging annotation to the main application class for potential startup logging.

src/test/java/nl/optifit/backendservice/.general_idea: Exclude CosmosDB VectorStore auto-configuration to prevent test failures due to missing credentials or dependencies in the test environment.
Add necessary imports for the excluded auto-configuration classes and Spring AI components.
Add a clarifying comment to the contextLoads test method.

pom.xml.general_idea: Updated the Java source and target version properties from 17 to 21 to enable compilation for the new JDK.
Explicitly set the Maven compiler plugin source and target to 21 to ensure bytecode compatibility with JDK 21.
Upgraded the Spring Boot parent version from 3.4.2 to 3.5.5 to align with JDK 21 support and latest features.
Added Spring Data JPA starter to enable database persistence capabilities.
Added Spring Security starter to implement application security.
Added OAuth2 Resource Server starter to support token-based authentication.
Added WebSocket starter to support real-time communication.
Added Validation starter to support bean validation annotations.
Added SpringDoc OpenAPI starter to generate API documentation.
Added Keycloak Admin Client to manage Keycloak resources programmatically.
Added Resteasy client and Jackson provider for JAX-RS client functionality.
Added PostgreSQL driver for database connectivity.
Added H2 database driver for in-memory testing or development.
Added Spring AI Azure Cosmos DB vector store starter for RAG capabilities.
Added Spring AI OpenAI model starter for LLM integration.
Added Spring AI Chat client for chat interactions.
Added Spring AI Vector Store Advisors for retrieval augmentation.
Added Spring AI RAG module for retrieval-augmented generation.
Added OpenNLP tools for natural language processing tasks.
Added Microsoft Graph SDK for integrating with Microsoft 365 services.
Added Azure Identity library for authenticating with Azure services.
Added Google API Client for interacting with Google APIs.
Added Google OAuth Client Jetty for handling OAuth flows.
Added Google Drive API service library for file operations.
Added Google Auth Library for OAuth2 HTTP authentication.
Added Jackson Blackbird module for faster JSON serialization.
Added explicit Jackson annotations dependency.
Added explicit Jackson databind dependency.
Added Jackson JSR310 datatype for Java 8+ date/time support.
Added Spring Security Test for testing secured endpoints.
Added Flyway Core for database migration management.
Added Flyway PostgreSQL extension for PostgreSQL migrations.
Added explicit version for Lombok in annotation processor paths to ensure consistency.
Downgraded Azure WebApp Maven Plugin version, likely for compatibility or stability.
Renamed the Azure WebApp application name in the deployment configuration.
Added Maven Dependency Plugin execution to expose dependency versions as properties.
Added Maven profiles for local, cloud, and logging environments to manage active Spring profiles.
Added Spring AI BOM to manage versions of Spring AI dependencies.
Added Jackson BOM to manage versions of Jackson dependencies.
Added Resteasy BOM to manage versions of Resteasy dependencies.
Added Netty BOM to manage versions of Netty dependencies.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add pattern to ignore generated log files from version control.
Add pattern to ignore local environment configuration files.
Add pattern to ignore Azure-specific configuration or state files.

README.md.general_idea: Replaced the generic Spring Initializr README with a project-specific documentation for the SMYM backend service.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced '# Getting Started' and generic links with '# Backend Service SMYM' and custom overview.

README.md.general_idea: Added a directory tree visualization to document the project's source code and resource layout.
README.md.human_impl: Added '## Project Structure' section with a text-based tree of src/main/java and resources.

README.md.general_idea: Documented the steps to clone the repository and run Keycloak/PostgreSQL via Docker Compose.
README.md.human_impl: Added '## Running the Project Locally' with git clone and docker-compose up commands.

README.md.general_idea: Included a comprehensive example of the application-local.yml configuration file required for local development.
README.md.human_impl: Added a large YAML block under 'Add a local properties file' containing spring, chat, google, microsoft, jwt, keycloak, cron, notification, and frontend properties.

README.md.general_idea: Added instructions on how to access the OpenAPI/Swagger UI and Postman documentation.
README.md.human_impl: Added '## API Documentation' section pointing to http://localhost:9000/swagger-ui.html.

README.md.general_idea: Documented the endpoint used for bootstrapping initial data into the application.
README.md.human_impl: Added '## Bootstrapping Data' section with the URL http://localhost:9000/api/v1/bootstrap.
